name: Americold Realty Trust, Inc.
description: Americold Realty Trust, Inc. is a leading global owner, operator, and developer of temperature-controlled warehouses. Based in Atlanta, Georgia, the company provides temperature-controlled warehousing and transportation solutions to food producers, distributors, and retailers. Americold operates a vast network of cold storage facilities across North America, Europe, Asia-Pacific, and South America, serving as a critical link in the global food supply chain.
